items.title: GM earnings, Fed meeting, consumer confidence: What to Watch
items.description: Market Domination Overtime Host Jared Blikre previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Tuesday, January 27, including earnings results from companies like General Motors (GM), Boeing (BA), United Parcel Service (UPS), and more; the start of the Federal Reserve's January FOMC meeting; and the latest consumer confidence data print.To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures rise as tech leads, UnitedHealth weighs on Dow amid earnings flood
items.description: Tech stocks are a bright spot as tariffs, healthcare names, and political insecurity weigh on investors.
